title: taraxacum piluliferum
intro: Taraxacum piluliferum, commonly known as the Pilosella officinalis or False dandelion, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly containing inulin, a prebiotic fiber, and flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum piluliferum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
